## Test Cases

### TC-SEC-001: Security — D365 user has correct privileges for this feature

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **TC ID** | TC-SEC-001 |
| **ALM ID** | *(pending — set by /alm sync)* |
| **Area Path** | IS - D365 Avanade\f719-activity-management-manual-creation-of-emails-and-phone-call\ATV |
| **Iteration Path** | IS - D365 Avanade\Discovery |
| **Priority** | 1 |
| **Assigned To** | QA Engineer |
| **State** | Design |
| **Automation** | Manual |
| **Test Type** | Security |
| **Mapped FR** | *(pending — run /plan first)* |
| **User Story** | *(pending — run /plan first)* |
| **Security Role / Persona** | D365 user |

**Preconditions:**
- Test user assigned to 'D365 user' role only.
- No additional privileges granted via team membership.

**Test Steps:**
| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Sign in as the test user | Sign-in succeeds; default app module loads |
| 2 | Verify Read access on entities listed in §9.1 of the FDD | Records are visible per the persona's scope (User / BU / Org) |
| 3 | Attempt actions outside this persona's privilege | Action is blocked with a privilege error |
| 4 | Verify column-level security on cost / PII fields | Restricted columns hidden or read-only per FLS profile |

**Post-conditions:**
- No data leakage observed.

**Test Data:**
- User account assigned the 'D365 user' role with no other roles.

**Notes:**
Constitution §06: use OOB FS roles where applicable; verify no clone-and-modify of OOB roles.
